action.reasoning: Observation: iter 13 eval failed with device mismatch (model on CPU, tokens on GPU). Analysis: predict.py computed WT region embedding before moving model to device. Fix is trivial: move model to device before WT forward. Decision: correct predict.py, submit eval using checkpoints/best.pt to measure test spearman for the wt-subtraction model. Remaining time 0.6h is enough for eval (usually <5 min).
